examples: On this lush world, great beasts roam the jungles and pterodactyl-like creatures soar through the sky.
It showed a caveman trying to use a pterodactyl for an express delivery, only to watch it be gobbled up on take-off by a tyrannosaur.
The natural history museum, a single 100003600 million years ago pterodactyl egg mysterious hatch. The whole city is in terror of sky.
By comparing the fossil with others from earlier and later periods, scientists have been able to sketch a rough timeline of the pterodactyl's progression.
Haplocheirus sollers may not be as charismatic as T. rex or as agile as a pterodactyl but it's thought to solve a long standing puzzle.
